subcodes.first_line: O Luminous One! O Luminous One! By this is meant "the resplendent," for thus is Venus designated the Luminous One, inasmuch as it is a radiant star [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زهراء زهراء یعنی درخشنده از اینجهت زهره را زهراء گویند زیرا ستاره روشنی
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @naming of children; of individuals, @prayer for women, @call to action
